chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Jail Appeal No.S-338 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 26.09.2022 Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah advocate for appellant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- Learned counsel for appellant does not press this appeal on merits as appellant having served sentence has already been released from Prison on 08.05.2021 as reflected from letter dated 30.08.2022 of Senior Superintendent, Officer Incharge, Central Prison Correctional Facility Hyderabad. Accordingly, this appeal is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali Haider
